---
title: "Inverse Problems and Data Assimilation with Machine Learning"
subtitle: "Track D — Scientific ML"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Inverse Problems and Data Assimilation with Machine Learning

**Track**: Track D — Scientific ML

The fusion of classical inverse problem theory with modern machine learning: neural network surrogates for inverse problems, amortized inference, and simulation-based inference.

## Table of Contents

1. Neural Network Surrogates for Forward Models
2. Gradient-Based Inversion with Differentiable Simulators
3. Amortized Inference: Learning to Invert
4. Simulation-Based Inference (SBI)
5. Physics-Informed Inverse Problems
6. Learned Regularization and Priors
7. Neural Data Assimilation
8. Case Studies in SciML Inverse Problems

---

## Chapter 1: Neural Network Surrogates for Forward Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Gradient-Based Inversion with Differentiable Simulators

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Amortized Inference: Learning to Invert

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Simulation-Based Inference (SBI)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Physics-Informed Inverse Problems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Learned Regularization and Priors

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Neural Data Assimilation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Case Studies in SciML Inverse Problems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
